is a studio in Los Angeles, California that creates visual effects for film, television and gaming. Founded in 2005 by Aaron Sims,[[1]](#cite_note-1) it provides a variety of services including concept design and development, [3D printing](/wiki/3D_printing "3D printing"), previs and real-time [VFX](/wiki/Visual_effects "Visual effects"), augmented and [virtual reality](/wiki/Virtual_reality "Virtual reality"), and [video game](/wiki/Video_game "Video game") development.
Hart, Hugh (11 December 2008). ["From Hulk to Gort, Monster Man Gets Creative With Creatures"](https://www.wired.com/2008/12/monster-man-beh/). *Wired*. Retrieved 14 May 2024.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Visual effects studio in Los Angeles

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Aaron Sims Creative

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Industry | * Production * Visual Effects |
| Founded | 2005 |
| Headquarters | Los Angeles, California |
| Key people | * Aaron Sims (President, CEO) * Steffen Reichstadt (Creative Director) * Tyler Winther (Head of Development) |
| Services | * Development * Design * Previs * VFX * AR/VR * 3D Print |
| Website | [aaronsimscreative.com](https://aaronsimscreative.com) |

**Aaron Sims Creative** is a studio in Los Angeles, California that creates visual effects for film, television and gaming. Founded in 2005 by Aaron Sims,[[1]](#cite_note-1) it provides a variety of services including concept design and development, [3D printing](/wiki/3D_printing "3D printing"), previs and real-time [VFX](/wiki/Visual_effects "Visual effects"), augmented and [virtual reality](/wiki/Virtual_reality "Virtual reality"), and [video game](/wiki/Video_game "Video game") development.

## Background

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Aaron_Sims_Company&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Background")]

Aaron Sims began his career as a special effects artist under [Rick Baker](/wiki/Rick_Baker "Rick Baker") and [Stan Winston](/wiki/Stan_Winston "Stan Winston"), where he helped develop visual-effects techniques that had a significant influence on character and concept design for film and television. In 2005, he founded Aaron Sims Creative to create and realize characters, creatures and environments for all entertainment platforms.
